title: btmw: Paper-plot pipeline for Blue-Tilt Milky-Way Subhalos
description: Paper-plot pipeline that reproduces every figure in: J. Wu, T. K. Chan, V. J. Forouhar Moreno, "Cosmological zoom-in simulations of Milky Way host mass dark matter halos with a blue-tilted primordial power spectrum", Phys. Rev. D 112, 023512 (2025). arXiv:2412.16072. Intermediate per-figure caches are checked in so each figure can be regenerated quickly without access to the raw simulation data.

creators.name: Wu, Jianhao
creators.affiliation: The Chinese University of Hong Kong

creators.name: Chan, Tsang Keung
creators.affiliation: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
